description: One message containing an attendance number AND a risk - EVALS.md A5
source_text: Workshop 5 had 52 students today, though attendance has been dropping because the afternoon session now conflicts with school exam hours.

expected_assertion.reason: The attendance fact and the scheduling-conflict fact are each their own claim with their own quote span per PRD §9.2 schema; the drafter's per-fact citation rule (§12) depends on facts never being merged into one item. Item count is a floor, not an exact match — the model may legitimately map the same attendance number to more than one requirement key across runs (LLM non-determinism), which does not violate the one-fact-per-sentence rule.
